# CWE-821: Incorrect Synchronization (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-821-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var cacheMu sync.RWMutex
var tokenCache = map[string]string{}

// Vulnerable: read lock is taken while mutating shared state.
// Writers must hold an exclusive lock to avoid data races on the cache map.
func StoreToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	key := r.URL.Query().Get("session")
	value := r.URL.Query().Get("token")
	cacheMu.RLock()
	tokenCache[key] = value
	cacheMu.RUnlock()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
